title: Instrumentation Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger instrumentation design in practice judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Instrumentation Design in Practice is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Instrumentation Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good instrumentation design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Instrumentation Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
